scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "red,blue" "npm run dev --prefix music-player-backend" "npm run dev --prefix music-player-frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix music-player-frontend && npm run build --prefix music-player-backend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix music-player-backend && npm install --prefix music-player-frontend
